[TODO: replace with your non-goals, one per line.

formValues.naming: camelCase for vars/funcs, PascalCase for types/classes, SCREAMING_SNAKE for constants
formValues.test_philosophy: Tests alongside the code they cover
formValues.state_mgmt: React state + URL; Zustand only when shared.
formValues.observability: Structured JSON logs; OpenTelemetry traces; Sentry for errors.
formValues.common_instructions:
Prefer editing existing files over creating new ones.
When adding a dependency, call it out in the commit message and explain why.
If a function grows beyond 40 lines, split it.
Never introduce a new pattern without discussing it first.
formValues.known_gotchas:
Our test DB uses a non-standard port — see .env.test.example.
The legacy/ directory still uses CommonJS; new work should be ESM only.
Run migrations before tests on a fresh clone.
formValues.pointers:
@docs/architecture.md — system diagram and boundaries
@docs/workflow.md — contribution workflow
formValues.clis: git, gh, docker, kubectl, pnpm, psql
